nasb.text: Man puts an end to darkness, And to the farthest limit he searches out The rock in gloom and deep shadow.

esv.text: Man puts an end to darkness and searches out to the farthest limit the ore in gloom and deep darkness.

cnv.text: 人探求黑暗的盡頭， 查明在陰暗中的石礦，直到極處。

ccb.text: 世人探寻黑暗的尽头， 搜索幽暗的深处， 要得隐藏的矿石。
